title: cola chlorantha
intro: Cola chlorantha, also known as the 'Gambian cola nut', is a plant species native to West Africa, belonging to the family Sterculiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cola chlorantha include lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and reducing fever, making it a valuable resource in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Cola chlorantha are often made by drying the seeds or roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or powders for medicinal purposes.
